title: Make sure /task command in hive-telegram-bot supports issues creation

type.name: Feature
type.description: A request, idea, or new functionality

body:
It should work as reply to a message:

```
<link-to-repository>
<issue-text>
```

```
<issue-text>
<link-to-repository>
```

```
--repository <link-to-repository>
<issue-text>
```

```
<issue-text>
--repository <link-to-repository>
```

All these options should be correctly parsed.

issue title should be taken from the first line, if it fits fully, and if not `...` is added. Issue text will repeat everything fully in issue description.

That should not make --split feature broken, we just need to make sure that /task by default without --split is working for issue creation.

Issue should be created by the name of Hive Mind bot's gh user, and link to created issue should be answered as reply to message containing `/task` command. And this message should contain full link issue, so it possible to reply to it with `/solve` to actually execute solution.

Also it should be possible to make issue text inline with /task command:

```
/task <link-to-repository>
<issue-text>
```

```
/task <issue-text>
<link-to-repository>
```

```
/task --repository <link-to-repository>
<issue-text>
```

```
/task <issue-text>
--repository <link-to-repository>
```

All these options should be supported as well.

We need to collect data related about the issue to this repository, make sure we compile that data to `./docs/case-studies/issue-{id}` folder, and use it to do deep case study analysis (also make sure to search online for additional facts and data), list of each and all requirements from the issue, and propose possible solutions and solution plans for each requirement (we should also check known existing components/libraries, that solve similar problem or can help in solutions).

Please plan and execute everything in a single pull request, you have unlimited time and context, as context autocompacts and you can continue indefinetely, do as much as possible in one go, until it is each and every requirement fully addressed, and everything is totally done.
